# Session CC4 Handover
**Date:** 2026-04-18 (same day, fourth close)
**Agent:** Archer (CTO)
**Focus:** Beacon PDF bug fix + SB 179 auto-generated report

---

## What Was Done

### 1. Beacon PDF label/value collision fix (commit `7094fa5`)
**File:** `clearpath-beacon/src/pages/TemplatesPage.jsx` — `drawInfo()` helper

**Bug:** Counselor name was rendering on top of the colon across every pre-filled PDF (e.g. "Counselor:Kim Culley" with "K" overlapping ":"). Root cause: `getTextWidth()` was measuring the label *after* the font switched from bold to normal. Bold glyphs are wider than normal, so the measured width was too small, pushing the value text too far left.

**Fix:** Measure width in bold, before switching fonts. One-line reorder.

**Impact:** Fixes every template using `drawInfo` — SB 179, Caseload Summary, Mandated Report, Suicide Screening, Parent Conference, Progress Update, and others. Not just SB 179.

### 2. SB 179 Time Log → auto-generated report
Previously a blank fillable form. Now pulls `time_entries` for the current school year and computes everything server-side:

- Hours broken out by the 5 TIME_DOMAINS
- Direct vs. indirect split (guidance + planning + responsive = direct per SB 179)
- Auto-computed direct %, total hours, compliance status (80% threshold)
- Full detail table of every entry (date, domain, activity, minutes) via jspdf-autotable
- School year window derived from `counselor.school_year_start/end` fallback
- Signature block retained for principal sign-off

Generator is now `async`; dispatcher updated to `await`. Template card description updated: "Auto-generated from your time entries (YTD, with 80/20 compliance)".

### 3. Build verified
`npx vite build` passes clean. Cloudflare Pages will auto-deploy from the push.

## Lessons This Session

- **Font-dependent text measurement is a footgun.** `doc.getTextWidth()` uses whatever font is currently active. If you measure after a style change, you'll measure against the wrong glyphs. Always measure before switching. Applies to any jsPDF code that positions text adjacent to a measured label.
- **Fillable PDF templates are often the wrong answer for compliance products.** Counselors shouldn't hand-enter numbers into a compliance form when the system already has the data. SB 179 was a useful forcing function to convert blank forms → derived reports. Audit the other "Compliance / Documentation" templates (Caseload Summary especially) for the same pattern.
